<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\Framework\MockObject\Stub; use PHPUnit\Framework\MockObject\Invocation; /** * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit * * @internal This class is not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ final readonly class ReturnStub implements Stub { private mixed $value; public function __construct(mixed $value) { $this->value = $value; } public function invoke(Invocation $invocation): mixed { return $this->value; } }
